summary: Matched a batch of small camera-system functions in src/melee/cm/camera.c and tightened related camera headers/types. The decomp.dev report credited +1204 matched bytes, 14 new 100% camera matches, and partial improvements to fn_8002F360 and Camera_80030AC4. The PR primarily converted UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations into concrete signatures, exposed needed Dolphin/baselib types, and refined Camera/CameraDebugMode/CameraModeCallbacks layout enough to express debug/free-cam state, stage camera bounds helpers, background color access, and mode wrapper functions.
what_changed: Implemented 14 camera functions that decomp.dev reported as new 100% matches: fn_8002F908, fn_8002FBA0, Camera_8002BA00, Camera_8003006C, Camera_8002EEC8, fn_8002F488, Camera_8003019C, Camera_80030758, Camera_8002F784, Camera_8002F73C, Camera_8002F760, Camera_80030CD8, Camera_80030E10, and Camera_80031044.

Added small camera mode/control helpers: Camera_8002EEC8 updates movement.target_fov and resets via Camera_8002FE38 unless mode is 6; fn_8002F360 indexes CameraModeCallbacks by cm_80452C68.mode and invokes the callback when non-null; Camera_8002F73C and Camera_8002F760 wrap Camera_8002F4D4 with fixed third arguments 0 and 1.
Implemented Camera_8002BA00 as a recursive player-slot selection helper using sentinel slot 0xA and Player_GetEntity to skip missing players.

Implemented stage-bound rectangle/vector getters: fn_8002F488 fills a Vec4 with stage camera bound offsets, and fn_8002F908/fn_8002FBA0 compute HSD_RectF32 values from Stage_GetCamBounds* offsets and cm_803BCCA0._44 scale factors.
Implemented debug/free-camera entry Camera_8003006C by switching to mode 8, preserving last_mode for modes 0/1, reading current CObj interest, eye position, and FOV into cm_80452C68.debug_mode.

Implemented small accessors/wrappers including Camera_8003019C returning a Point3d inside the selected player's ftLib data, Camera_80030758 returning background RGB as GXColor, Camera_80030AC4 returning a stage/visibility-related bit condition, Camera_80030CD8 forwarding CameraBox.x1C into Camera_80030BBC, Camera_80030E10 returning 10000.f when unk_2B8 < 1 otherwise unk_2B0, and Camera_80031044 clearing cm_80452C68.unk_8C[arg0].

Updated camera.h prototypes from unknown signatures to concrete types such as s32, void, bool, float, GXColor, Vec4*, HSD_RectF32*, CameraBox*, and S32Vec2*; added required includes for GXStruct and Dolphin types.

Refined cm/types.h by moving/defining CameraDebugMode before Camera, embedding it at Camera offset 0x39C, changing Camera.mode from u32 to int, adding fields at offsets 0x2B0 through 0x2CC, replacing CameraModeCallbacks named void* fields with void* callback[9], and disabling the previous Camera size STATIC_ASSERT.
Removed a stale commented static declaration for cm_80453004 from camera.static.h.
smart_moves: Batching many short leaf/accessor functions in one PR produced a measurable match gain with low behavioral complexity; decomp.dev reported +1204 bytes and +0.03% matched code.
Replacing CameraModeCallbacks' nine separately named void* members with callback[9] made fn_8002F360 express the assembly pattern as indexed dispatch by camera mode.
Embedding CameraDebugMode into the main Camera struct let Camera_8003006C naturally store mode 8/free-cam CObj state through cm_80452C68.debug_mode rather than relying on a separate commented static.

The duplicate implementations of fn_8002F908 and fn_8002FBA0 intentionally mirror each other; the source comment notes the duplication, preserving a match-oriented shape instead of prematurely abstracting shared logic.
Thin wrapper functions such as Camera_8002F73C, Camera_8002F760, and Camera_80030CD8 were kept as wrappers around underlying helpers, which is often necessary for matching small codegen patterns.
Concrete header signatures were updated alongside implementations, reducing future UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS surface area for camera decomp work.
decomp_lessons: For callback tables, an array member can be the matching-friendly representation even when earlier headers guessed separate named slots.
Do not collapse duplicate-looking functions when the binary has distinct symbols; fn_8002F908 and fn_8002FBA0 both matched as separate 220-byte functions despite equivalent source logic.
Camera mode/debug state appears tightly coupled to cm_80452C68; future work should check whether fields around offsets 0x39C+ belong inside Camera rather than as independent globals.
Small accessors that return structs by value, such as GXColor Camera_80030758, can unlock clean signatures once the correct Dolphin headers are included.
Sentinel values and recursion can be required for slot-scanning matches; Camera_8002BA00 uses 0xA as a special slot and recursively skips empty Player_GetEntity slots.

Struct refinement may require temporarily disabling or revisiting stale size assertions; here the Camera size STATIC_ASSERT was commented out after layout changes, so future work should revalidate the final Camera size/layout.
naming_conventions: Unidentified camera functions continue to use address-based names such as Camera_8002BA00 and fn_8002F908.
A source comment documents Camera_8002F784 as Camera_SetModeTraining, but the exported symbol/prototype in this PR remains Camera_8002F784.
Camera globals follow the existing cm_ address naming pattern: cm_80452C68, cm_80453004, cm_803BCB18, and cm_803BCCA0.
Struct fields still use offset/unknown names where semantics are incomplete, for example unk_2B0, unk_2B8, unk_2C4, unk_2C5, unk_399_b5, and _44.
Debug-mode fields use descriptive names where inferred: last_mode, ply_slot, mode7_int_offset, mode7_eye_offset, mode8_int_pos, mode8_eye_pos, and mode8_fov.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Use direct indexed callback dispatch for function-pointer tables: callbacks->callback[cm_80452C68.mode], then null-check before calling.
Preserve wrapper functions instead of inlining behavior when the target binary has separate small functions with fixed arguments.
Keep duplicated source bodies when two separate target functions match the same logic shape.
Use exact literal constants visible in behavior/codegen-sensitive branches, such as slot sentinel 0xA, mode 6, mode 8, scale factor 0.5f, and fallback 10000.f.
Represent stage camera bounds through repeated Stage_GetCamBoundsLeftOffset/RightOffset/TopOffset/BottomOffset calls and HSD_RectF32 field assignments rather than abstracting into helpers.
For debug camera matching, pull current HSD_CObj state through GET_COBJ, HSD_CObjGetInterest, HSD_CObjGetEyePosition, and HSD_CObjGetFov into persistent camera debug fields.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the provided slice.
decomp.dev bot reported matched code rose to 32.09% (+0.03%, +1204 bytes).
decomp.dev bot reported 14 new 100% matches in main/melee/cm/camera.
decomp.dev bot reported two partial improvements: fn_8002F360 reached 50.00% and Camera_80030AC4 reached 87.50%.
follow_up_queries: Check later camera PRs for re-enabling or correcting STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(struct Camera)) after the CameraDebugMode layout change.
Search for Camera_80030AC4 to see what final expression or bitfield layout made the remaining 12.5% match.
Search for fn_8002F360 later changes to see whether the function-pointer type changed from void* callback[9] to typed callbacks.
Audit users of Camera_8002F784 to determine whether it was later renamed to Camera_SetModeTraining.
Compare fn_8002F908 and fn_8002FBA0 in later history to confirm whether the duplicate-function comment remained or if shared semantics were named.
